generatedResponsibilities: wrap the verified SVG in a review-friendly HTML surface
summarize the claim, evidence, and boundary
preserve the proof graph meaning without adding new trust claims
equivalenceRules: HTML must preserve the verified SVG graph unchanged.
HTML summary must match the computed report and receipts.
HTML may frame the proof graph but may not add new trust claims.
HTML must keep the same node count, edge count, and blocked boundary.
completionPosture: HTML review surfaces are governed projections and do not themselves imply Level 4 maturity.
